title: Seaworthy Swimming Sextant session-open: portable memory/state substrate contracts
body: Session-open on agentic-engineering-enhancements. Active-claims registry has no live claims; commit queue contains only abandoned advisory history, so no other agents present for this slice. Scope: execute the portable memory/state substrate contract inventory/template before any local doctor implementation; preserve Practice Core vs repo-local boundary; treat legacy comms/events as transition defect with provenance, not a second live state home; no fitness-driven content trimming.
